description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a dark, hipped roof surrounded by dense greenery and a well-maintained lawn. The house features a rectangular footprint and is bordered by a low hedge or shrubbery, providing privacy and a natural boundary. The main entryway is visible at the front, marked by a small porch and a pathway leading up to it. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible facades, contributing to a balanced and inviting appearance. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, contrasting with the dark roof. The property is set within a fenced lot, with a driveway or paved area adjacent to the house.
description: A single-story house with a dark hipped roof, light exterior walls, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by dense greenery and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, and the house surrounded by dense greenery and a lawn.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the fenced yard, back of the house, and the arrangement of greenery around the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, the hedge boundary, and the driveway or paved area adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear of the house, the full extent of the fenced yard, and the surrounding landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, steps, and a pathway, framed by shrubbery and a modest overhang.
